_descriptor_type: A type of descriptor. One of 'simulation', 'trace', and 'perf'.
_architecture: A name of the available architectures (PARAMS.<architecture>) found in scarab repository, which defines the machine parameters of the default configuration.
_experiment: Combined overnight run: SPEC2006 (rate_int+rate_fp) AND datacenter, self-contained. Per suite it carries the references (baseline; marked_hit_cov100 = the cov_100 force-hit headroom; all_hit) and the 28 acc100 perfect-prefetch configs, PLUS every prefetch config at --branch_load_dep_pf_success_rate {0.7,0.5} x --branch_load_dep_pf_success_seed {1,2} (unreliable prefetcher on the full feeder set, so feeder retention can be tested as the rescue on recurring lines). Supersedes bld_pf_repl_spec06/bld_pf_repl_datacenter (which can be killed). REQUIRES scarab built from bld-prefetch-seqnum-csv with the success-rate params.
_workload_manager: manual: run each exp scenario with all the simpoints at a time, slurm: Slurm schedules simulations based on its policy
_root_dir: Root directory mounted into the docker container home, for instance, the user's home directory
_application_dir: The path to the benchmark application directory used for tracing or simulation.
_scarab_path: The path to the scarab repository that contains the scarab binary used to run the experiment. Must be built from the bld-prefetch-seqnum-csv branch (adds --branch_load_dep_pf_replay).
_traces_dir: The local directory containing all simpointed traces
_top_simpoint: Run only top 3 simpoints stored in 'workloads_top_simp.json'. Must match bld_pf_record_spec06 so the recorded pf.csv/braddr.csv cover the simpoints the replay reads back.
_simulations: SPEC CPU2006 integer + floating-point rate suites (matches bld_pf_record_spec06 and dcache_marked_hit_vs_perfect_spec06).
_configurations: Prefetcher common params (all pf_* configs): --branch_load_dep_pf_replay 1, pf trigger stream from --branch_load_dep_pf_dir, coverage line-set from --branch_load_dep_pf_coverage_dir. Both dirs point at bld_traces_kmhv3_pf (the bld_pf_record_spec06 output); repoint pf_coverage_dir to bld_traces_kmhv3 to gate on the original braddr set. Sweep axes: --branch_load_dep_pf_lookahead (W, retire-order op_num units; ROB=352) and --branch_load_dep_pf_coverage (fraction of braddr stall cycles kept; 1.0 = no gating). Fill level: _l1 = --branch_load_dep_pf_level 0 (L1D), _l2 = --branch_load_dep_pf_level 1 (L2/MLC). L2 fills leave the L1D unpolluted but need the load to hit the freshly-filled L2 on demand; comparing _l1 vs _l2 per point isolates whether L1D pollution or L2 residency dominates.

pf_la128_cov100_l1._params: Plain prefetch, fill L1D, cov 1.0: W=128 < ROB(352): too-late reference.

pf_la128_cov100_l1_acc70_s1._params: pf_la128_cov100_l1 at prefetch success rate 0.7, seed 1 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl1_acc70_s1._params: pf_la8192_drrip0_rl1 at prefetch success rate 0.7, seed 1 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl1_acc70_s2._params: pf_la8192_drrip0_rl1 at prefetch success rate 0.7, seed 2 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl1_acc50_s1._params: pf_la8192_drrip0_rl1 at prefetch success rate 0.5, seed 1 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl1_acc50_s2._params: pf_la8192_drrip0_rl1 at prefetch success rate 0.5, seed 2 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2._params: pf_la8192_cov100_l1 + drrip_feeder_rrpv0 protection in L2/MLC (prefetch marks the line as a feeder on fill).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2_acc70_s1._params: pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2 at prefetch success rate 0.7, seed 1 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2_acc70_s2._params: pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2 at prefetch success rate 0.7, seed 2 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2_acc50_s1._params: pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2 at prefetch success rate 0.5, seed 1 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2_acc50_s2._params: pf_la8192_drrip0_rl2 at prefetch success rate 0.5, seed 2 (unreliable prefetcher, full feeder set).

marked_hit_cov100._params: Reference ceiling: attribution force-hit oracle (any access to a recorded line completes at L1 hit latency), full coverage. Reads braddr from the same recorded set.

all_hit._params: Reference ceiling: perfect-D$ hit-latency oracle (every load completes at L1 hit latency).

_mem: Memory scheduling and collection settings for Slurm jobs.
